content:
# Session 322 (iter-322) — FBC carved blocks + PTC cmp_leg de-risk

## Metadata
- 2 prover lanes, both GREEN (`lake env lean` EXIT 0, per task results).
- Sorry: FBC 5→6 (net +1 = new `openImmersion_beckChevalley` scaffold); PTC 1→2 (net +1 = `cmp_leg` core-C residual).
- Global net +2 sorry, but structurally net-positive (see below).
- 25 edits, 0 build/goal-check events logged (build-blind scratch-loop; LSP times out on both files).

## FBC — Cohomology/CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean (must-fix gate MET: closed 2 carved blocks)

### SOLVED sorry-free
- **`coverInterOpen_baseChange_eq`**: `coverInterOpen 𝒰' σ = g'⁻¹ᵁ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ` for base-changed cover, `[Finite κ]`. Genuine work: per-member open-immersion base-change range identity. Reconstructed the `openCoverOfLeft` pullback square (`IsPullback.of_bot` + `pullback.lift_snd/fst`), transported onto `g'` via `IsPullback.of_iso` (commg by `h.isoPullback_inv_fst.symm`), applied `IsOpenImmersion.image_preimage_eq_preimage_image_of_isPullback`. Instance-synth hazard (`IsOpenImmersion` of `pushforwardIso` member fails synth with `IsPullback` in local ctx) fixed by `@`-application giving both instances explicitly.
- **2 new sorry-free private helpers**: `coverOpen_baseChange_eq` (per-member range identity), `coe_iInf_of_finite` (`↑(⨅) = ⋂` for `[Finite κ]`, via `isOpen_iInter_of_finite`).
- `[Finite κ]` GENUINELY required: `Opens.comap`/`Opens.map` is a `FrameHom`, preserves only finite meets; for infinite κ the `⨅` is `interior(⋂)` and preimage does not commute. Čech use over `Fin (n+1)` is finite ⇒ consumer unaffected.

### PARTIAL / scaffold
- **`restrictedCartesianAffinePushout`** — ⚠ **STATEMENT MISMATCH (lvb-fbc322 must-fix, CONFIRMED)**: Lean proves only the scheme-level `IsPullback (pullback.snd g' (ι V)) (pullback.fst g' (ι V)) (ι V) g'`, body `(IsPullback.of_hasPullback _ _).flip` — tautological, NO affineness/`f`/`S`/`S'` hyps. Blueprint `lem:restricted_cartesian_affine_pushout` (titled "affine ring pushout") asserts an `IsPushout` of comm rings, corner `A_σ⊗_R R'`, under `[IsSeparated f][IsAffine S][IsAffine S']`. The Lean is strictly weaker; ring-pushout content deferred to the still-`sorry` `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange`. Prover knowingly chose the true geometric statement over a fabricated richer `sorry`; decl is NOT protected. **Added `% NOTE:` to the chapter** (see Blueprint markers). Since the decl is sorry-free, the statement-block `\leanok` over-marks; planner must re-sign the Lean to ring form OR re-state blueprint.
- **`openImmersion_beckChevalley`** (NEW typed scaffold, `sorry`): `(pullback g').obj (pushPullObj F (Over.mk p)) ≅ pushPullObj ((pullback g').obj F) (Over.mk p')` over cartesian `IsPullback gV p' p g'` with `[IsOpenImmersion p]`. Exact shape `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma` consumes; the genuine open-immersion Beck–Chevalley sheaf iso = real remaining content. Statement matches blueprint exactly; honest scaffold (statement `\leanok`, proof not).

### Still blocked (comment-only updates)
- `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (L523): residual = abstract→tilde identification of both comparison sides (altitude-2).
- `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma` (L745): delegates to `openImmersion_beckChevalley`. **Auditor MAJOR**: documented proof needs `[Finite κ]` but signature `{κ : Type}(σ : κ → 𝒰.I₀)` lacks it; the sorry masks this — proof cannot complete as-written without adding `[Finite κ]`.
- `cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` (L589), `twisted_cech_nerve_iso` (L813): cosimplicial naturalities, unchanged.
- `pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (L165): held leaf-1, off reduce-to-absolute path.

## PTC — Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/PullbackTensorComp.lean (de-risk PARTIAL; hit named STOP)

### `cmp_leg` (NEW, ~L752) — reduced to isolated core C, NOT closed
- **Attempt 1 (analogist homEquiv-transpose) — FAILED mechanically.** `congrArg homEquiv (pullbackValIso_comp ...)` then `homEquiv_naturality_left/_right`. `homEquiv_naturality_right` fires once. But `homEquiv_naturality_left` whnf-detonates under `erw` (200k-hb timeout) and does NOT match under `rw` (matching `F.map ?f` vs `sheafification.map(PC.inv)` forces whnf of the `mkOfHomEquiv` left functor). After one `naturality_right`, the deprecated `Sheaf.val` coercion makes the goal ill-typed at `instances` transparency (`Z.ringCatSheaf : TopCat.Sheaf RingCat` vs expected `Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology) RingCat`), breaking every subsequent kabstract. ⇒ the iter-322 "≤40 LOC homEquiv shortcut" is partially optimistic.
- **Attempt 2 (roadmap-form + hand reduction) — PARTIAL, 22-line prefix VERIFIED.** Statement TYPECHECKS in roadmap form (`SheafOfModules.forget` + plain sheafification unit). Proof: `cancel_mono (forget pbc.inv)` → collapse `forget pbc.hom≫inv→𝟙` + rewrite through sheaf-level Sq4 `pullbackValIso_comp` → `erw [Category.comp_id]` + `Functor.map_comp ×2` → `unit.naturality_assoc` + `Functor.id_map` + `Iso.hom_inv_id_app`. **Whole file compiles end-to-end** (`lake env lean`, no errors, ~9.5 min). Reduces `cmp_leg` to single residual **core coherence C**.
- **Core C** = `leftAdjointUniq` composite-adjunction-unit mate calculus (the predicted ~100-LOC hard core). `scPb_h = Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq adjA adjB`. Tools `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` + `leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit`, BUT the plain sheafification unit `η` must first align with `adjB`'s **composite-adjunction** unit (`Adjunction.comp` unit). `simp only` with the two `@[simp]` lemmas + `pullbackValIso` unfold makes NO progress — units do not align syntactically. Needs `Adjunction.comp_unit_app` expansion + interactive goal tracking (LSP times out).

### `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (L1060) — UNCHANGED
- Gated on `cmp_leg` core C. The continuation-lemma assembly (steps 1–6) cannot wire until `cmp_leg` closes; every kabstract on the post-Step-D goal under the REQUIRED `respectTransparency false` detonates on the `Scheme.Modules.pullback ≟ SheafOfModules.pullback` / `Sheaf.val` coercion — SAME whnf/coercion wall named in PROGRESS.md. Prover hit the planner's explicit STOP condition.

## Subagent verdicts
- **lean-auditor (aud322)**: 1 major, 3 minor, 0 must-fix. MAJOR = `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma` documented proof needs `[Finite κ]` absent from signature. MINORs: `_hsq` leading-underscore on essential hyp; others stylistic. Both files structurally sound; all sorries genuine; `cmp_leg` verified prefix legitimately reduces to core C; no axioms.
- **lvb-fbc322**: 1 must-fix = `restrictedCartesianAffinePushout` statement mismatch (above). `coverInterOpen_baseChange_eq` faithful (prose "every index family" should read "every *finite* index family"). `openImmersion_beckChevalley` faithful honest scaffold. Helpers correctly unblueprinted.
- **lvb-ptc322**: 0 must-fix, 1 major = `cmp_leg` + steps (5)–(7) assembly UNBLUEPRINTED (needs `\label+\lean+\uses` block; sketch never describes per-leg split / `δ_h`-natural / core-C mate calculus). Partial guidance exists (core C = transpose of already-blueprinted Sq1).

## Blueprint doctor
Broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2) and `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (12) — all HELD/off-front lanes (QuotScheme/GlueDescent), non-gating. No orphan chapters, no new axioms.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex`, `lem:restricted_cartesian_affine_pushout`: added `% NOTE:` (iter-322) flagging the STATEMENT MISMATCH — Lean proves the weaker sorry-free scheme-level square, not the asserted affine ring pushout; the statement-block `\leanok` over-marks; planner to re-sign or re-state. (Did NOT remove `\leanok` — the Lean decl genuinely exists sorry-free; the divergence is content-level, best surfaced as NOTE + recommendation.)

## Headline
Disciplined two-lane iter; both delivered the planned content, neither fully closed, and BOTH surfaced honest must-fix/major debt. FBC closed 2 carved blocks (gate met) but one closure (`restrictedCartesianAffinePushout`) is a tautological under-statement vs its blueprint — the planner must re-sign before it can carry the affine-reduction heart. PTC's analogist de-risk did NOT pan out mechanically (homEquiv route detonates on `Sheaf.val` poison) but the prover's hand-reduction still isolated `cmp_leg`'s residual into a clean named core C — exactly the planner's pre-declared escalation point. No churn: both provers obeyed the don't-re-paste pre-commits.
